name: MoveIt Planner
description: Create a MoveItPlanner from a connected RosClient. Optionally sets the robot cell on construction so planning calls don't re-upload geometry.

inputParameters.name: ros_client
inputParameters.description: Connected RosClient (from the ROS Client component).

inputParameters.name: robot_cell
inputParameters.description: Optional RobotCell to assign to the planner via set_robot_cell. Recommended when the cell is known upfront.
